relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: Jesus goes up the mountain and gathers the disciples near.
He opens his mouth and teaches the way of heaven’s reign.
The poor in spirit are named flourishing because heaven’s reign belongs to them.
Those who mourn are not abandoned; comfort is promised.
The gentle inherit the earth without domination.
Those hungry for justice will be filled.
Mercy opens the channel of mercy.
A purified heart becomes capable of seeing the Divine.
Peacemakers reveal themselves as children of the Divine.
Those pressured because of justice belong to heaven’s reign.
False accusation and insult do not erase blessing.
Joy rises because the prophets walked this path before.
The disciples are salt, preserving flavor and covenantal presence in the earth.
They are light for the world, a visible city on a hill.
Light is meant to shine in the house, not hide under a basket.
Visible goodness gives glory back to the Father in the heavens.
Jesus does not dissolve Torah and prophets; he brings them to fullness.
Nothing true in divine instruction is casually erased.
Doing and teaching are bound together in heaven’s reign.
Justice must become deeper than performance and status.
The command against murder is brought inward.
Anger and contempt are exposed as fires that begin in speech.
Worship cannot bypass a wounded relationship.
Reconciliation comes before offering.
Make peace on the way before conflict hardens into judgment.
Unresolved debt binds until the last measure is paid.
The command against adultery is named.
Desire that turns another person into possession begins the rupture in the heart.
Whatever causes deep stumbling must be removed with seriousness.
Whole-life integrity matters more than clinging to a harmful member-pattern.
The legal practice of release is addressed.
Jesus protects the vulnerable from casual abandonment and relational harm.
Oaths are brought under truthfulness.
Heaven itself cannot be used to prop up false speech.
Earth and Jerusalem also belong to the Divine order.
Even the head and hair are not fully under human command.
Simple truthful speech is the restored way.
Retaliation is named as the old measure.
Jesus opens a path beyond mirrored harm.
Even legal taking is met with disarming freedom.
Forced distance becomes chosen overflow.
Generosity interrupts fear and grasping.
Neighbor-love is expanded beyond the border of enemy.
Enemy-love and prayer become the sign of heaven’s children.
The Father sends sun and rain beyond human deserving.
Love only for those who love you does not reveal new creation.
Greeting only your own keeps love tribal.
The call is wholeness: complete love reflecting the complete Father.
